ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month in which the order was placed */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the order */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Unique stock-keeping unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the product is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the order item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price_each" TEXT /* Price of each unit of the product */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the order item */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the order item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping process */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was shipped */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the order */,
  "shipping_status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipping */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Name of the shipping carrier */,
  "ship_from_address" TEXT /* Address from which the order is shipped */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipping record was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipping record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid for the order */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was made */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., pending, paid, refunded) */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway used */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
